div.head: The Ambassador in Canada (Atherton) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: I have the honor to refer to the Department’s Secret instruction No. 592 of February 13, 1945, enclosing the final draft of the Soviet Fourth Protocol and, in compliance therewith, to enclose the original official copy for the United States Government, duly signed today in OttawaFor text of signed protocol, see Department of State, Soviet Supply Protocols, pp. 89–156; for announcement of signature, made at Ottawa on April 20, see Department of State Bulletin, April 22, 1945, p. 723. by me on behalf of the United States Government, by the Right Honorable Malcolm MacDonaldBritish High Commissioner in Canada. for the United Kingdom, by Mr. W. L. Mackenzie KingCanadian Prime Minister and Secretary of State for External Affairs. and Mr. J. L. IlsleyCanadian Minister of Finance. for Canada, and by Mr. G. Zaroubin for the Soviet Union.
